items.title: Schema markup update
items.description: Updated schema markup to use 'inLanguage' instead of 'availableLanguage' for NewsArticle, eliminating Google schema warnings and improving SEO compatibility.

items.title: AI panel request optimization
items.description: Fixed a bug that caused too many AI requests when clicking 'Generate suggestions' in the AI panel. Unnecessary requests for other features are now properly filtered out.

items.title: Gallery ad template update
items.description: Image gallery ads now use the same provider logic as other ad placements. Ad wrapper templates are organized into provider-specific folders for better maintainability. **Note:** Custom ad wrappers must be moved to a folder matching the ad wrapper name.
